name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Financial support of ₹6,000 per year for landowning farmers across India.

name: UP Senior Pension Scheme
description: Old age pension monthly assistance of ₹1,000 for senior citizens in UP.

name: UP Kanya Sumangala Yojana
description: Financial assistance of ₹15,000 for girls' education, health, and welfare in Uttar Pradesh.

name: UP Free Tablet Smartphone Yojana
description: Free tablets and smartphones for college students and youth pursuing higher education in Uttar Pradesh.

name: Ayushman Bharat Yojana
description: Universal health insurance coverage providing up to ₹5 Lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin
description: Provides financial assistance of ₹1.2 Lakhs to rural families for constructing pucca houses with basic amenities.

name: UP Widow Pension Scheme
description: Pension assistance of ₹1,000 per month for widows residing in Uttar Pradesh.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
issuing_body: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Free LPG connections and cylinder support to women from below poverty line (BPL) households.

name: UP Divyangjan Pension Yojana
description: Financial monthly assistance of ₹1,000 for disabled persons (40% or more disability) in Uttar Pradesh.

name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-dhan
description: Voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganized sector workers providing ₹3,000/month after age 60.

name: UP Shadi Bimari Yojana
description: Financial marriage grant of ₹20,000 for daughters of poor families in Uttar Pradesh.

name: National Social Assistance Programme - IGNDPS
description: Disability pension for BPL citizens aged between 18 and 79 with severe or multiple disabilities.

name: UP Free Cycle Scheme
description: Provides free cycles to registered construction laborers in Uttar Pradesh to commute to work.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana - Shishu
description: Collateral-free loans up to ₹50,000 for starting small businesses or shops.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana - Kishor
description: Collateral-free business loans between ₹50,000 and ₹5 Lakhs for expanding micro enterprises.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana - Tarun
description: Collateral-free business expansion loans between ₹5 Lakhs and ₹10 Lakhs for established businesses.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
issuing_body: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority
description: Government-backed pension scheme providing monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after age 60.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accidental death and disability insurance cover of ₹2 Lakhs at a premium of just ₹20 per year.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance cover of ₹2 Lakhs in case of death due to any reason, at a premium of ₹436 per year.

name: PM Street Vendor AtmaNirbhar Nidhi
issuing_body: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Special micro-credit facility providing working capital loans up to ₹10,000 for street vendors.

name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
issuing_body: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Skill training, toolkit incentive of ₹15,000, and low-interest collateral-free loans for traditional artisans and craftsmen.

name: UP Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
description: Tuition fee reimbursement and maintenance stipend for UP students studying in Class 11, 12, or higher courses.

name: UP Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme
description: Financial scholarship for students studying in Class 9 and 10 in Uttar Pradesh schools.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
description: Provides at least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Placement-linked skill training program for rural poor youth to enhance employability and income.

name: Prime Minister Employment Generation Programme
issuing_body: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Credit-linked subsidy program for setting up new micro-enterprises in manufacturing or service sectors, offering subsidies up to 35%.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
issuing_body: Department of School Education and Literacy
description: Scholarship of ₹12,000 per year awarded to meritorious students from economically weaker sections to prevent drop-outs after Class 8.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme offering financial support to farmers suffering crop loss or damage due to natural calamities.

name: Kisan Credit Card Scheme
issuing_body: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development
description: Provides farmers with timely credit cards to meet their cultivation and crop production needs at a very low interest rate.

name: UP Mukhyamantri Abhyuday Yojana
description: Free coaching classes (physical and virtual) for competitive exams like UPSC, JEE, NEET, and NDA for students in UP.

name: UP Bhagirathi River Fishery Scheme
description: Financial assistance and subsidies to fishermen and fish breeders for river farming and boat purchasing.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana
description: Flagship scheme for sustainable development of the fisheries sector, supporting aquaculture, deep sea fishing, and cold chain infrastructure.

name: UP Gopalak Yojana
description: Loans up to ₹9 Lakhs for unemployed youth in Uttar Pradesh to establish dairy farms with 10 to 20 cattle.

name: UP Kamdhenu Dairy Scheme
description: Capital subsidy and commercial bank loans for starting high-yield milk-producing dairy centers in rural UP.

name: UP Solar Pump Yojana
description: Provides up to 60% subsidy to farmers for installing solar water pumps for agricultural irrigation.

name: UP Atal Residential School Admission Scheme
description: Free high-quality residential boarding school education (class 6 to 12) for the children of registered laborers.

name: UP Matritva Shishu Evam Balika Madad Yojana
issuing_body: Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
description: Financial assistance of ₹25,000 for maternity costs and newborn child care to registered construction workers.

name: UP Shramik Awas Sahayata Yojana
description: Financial aid of ₹1 Lakh for house construction or repairs to registered building construction laborers.

name: UP Mukhyamantri Bal Seva Yojana
description: Financial assistance of ₹4,000 per month for orphans or children who lost breadwinners to pandemics.

name: Sovereign Gold Bond Scheme
description: Government securities denominated in grams of gold, offering a secure gold investment with 2.5% annual interest.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Bank loans between ₹10 Lakhs and ₹1 Crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: A high-interest savings scheme targeted at parents of girl children to build a fund for their higher education and marriage.

name: UP Sant Ravidas Shiksha Sahayata Yojana
description: Monthly education stipend from ₹150 to ₹2,000 for children of registered laborers studying in class 1 to higher degrees.

name: UP Kaushal Vikas Mission Training Scheme
issuing_body: Department of Vocational Education and Skill Development
description: Free skill training and certification in high-demand industrial sectors for unemployed youth in UP.

name: UP ODOP Toolkit Training Scheme
issuing_body: Department of MSME and Export Promotion
description: Skill upgrade training and free modern toolkits distributed to local artisans under the One District One Product scheme.

name: PM Programme for Restoration Awareness Generation Nourishment of Mother Earth
description: Promotes balanced use of chemical fertilizers along with organic and bio-fertilizers, offering subsidies on soil health testing.

name: UP Free Boring Scheme
description: Provides financial grant and boring facilities to small and marginal farmers in UP for irrigation tube wells.

name: UP Mukhyamantri Audyogik Kushta Pension
description: Monthly pension assistance of ₹3,000 for leprosy-affected individuals residing in UP.

name: National Career Service Portal Registration
description: A single-point platform offering job matching, career counseling, and vocational guidance to job seekers across India.

name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
description: Scholarship awarded to top 80th percentile board students pursuing graduate or post-graduate courses, providing ₹12,000 per year.
